seoTitle: Marrangaroo vs Marrickville — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Marrangaroo and Marrickville. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Marrangaroo and Marrickville.
heading: Marrangaroo vs Marrickville — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Marrangaroo, New South Wales and Marrickville, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Marrangaroo has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Marrickville (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Marrangaroo or Marrickville safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Marrangaroo has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Marrickville scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Marrangaroo scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Marrickville scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Marrangaroo or Marrickville?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Marrangaroo has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
